'''Maxim''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who served in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]]. In [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], he caused a minor scandal, resulting in charges of corruption to be made against him. [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum]] did not intervene due to issues with the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] arising from the [[Nebula Front/Legends|Nebula Front]] and destroyed the ''[[Revenue]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Cloak of Deception]]'' {{1stm}}
